entryRequirements.visaNote: Complex and nationality-dependent: some nationalities get 30-day visa-free entry, others qualify for 10-day or 240-hour visa-free transit if continuing to a third country, others need a full visa or Shenzhen-specific 5-day Visa on Arrival. Rules vary significantly — verify carefully by nationality and itinerary before travel.

transportInfo.paymentCard: Shenzhen Tong card or WeChat Pay/Alipay QR (increasingly the dominant payment method city-wide)
mainSystems: Shenzhen Metro (17 lines, one of the world's largest systems)
transportInfo.note: Mobile QR payment (WeChat Pay/Alipay) is close to essential in Shenzhen — cash is increasingly uncommon; set up a China-compatible payment app before arrival if possible.

majorEventsNote: Chinese New Year and National Day 'Golden Week' are massive nationwide travel surges — domestic transport and hotels book out; best avoided or planned around well in advance.
